name: What metrics should I watch after optimizing for voice search?
description: Watch question queries, local impressions, calls, direction requests, and map actions. Those signals are usually more useful than trying to isolate every voice

mainEntity.name: What metrics should I watch after optimizing for voice search?

acceptedAnswer.text: Track question-based queries, impressions for local terms, click-to-call actions, direction requests, and pages that earn map-related visits. Search Console and Google Business Profile are usually the most practical starting points.
acceptedAnswer.description: Watch question queries, local impressions, calls, direction requests, and map actions. Those signals are usually more useful than trying to isolate every voice search directly.
